prompt: Run the fixed bounded gardening task twice from the specified conditions. The first run may make only relevant repairs; the second must find no repeat drift and make no unrelated rewrite.
applicability: Applicable when the owner defines a bounded recurring maintenance scope and authorizes two identical-condition runs.
acceptance_tests: The first run changes only the bounded relevant scope.
The second identical-condition run reports no repeat drift.
Both runs pass the named target validation.
mandatory_failures: Either run expands scope or rewrites unrelated files.
Evaluator cleanup is missing from the intervention log.
evidence_requirements: Bounded scope, trigger, and two run transcripts.
Before/after path and digest inventories for both runs.
